HGSS.600.0000:
Along the way to Cianwood, there are
four deserted islands.\f
Bad kids are taken to the islands
as punishment!
HGSS.600.0001:
Whenever I get in trouble, Daddy
always scares me.
HGSS.600.0002:
My sister gave me a lot of Seals!\r
Here, have some!\f
HGSS.600.0003:
Wow!
You have so many Seals!\f
You can cover your Poké Balls in Seals!
HGSS.600.0004: I can give you better ones tomorrow!
HGSS.600.0005:
Huh?
You don’t have a Seal Case?\r
I was gonna give you some Seals...
HGSS.600.0009: Stick them on your Ball Capsules!
HGSS.600.0011:
The [010A,0000,0000] was
put away in the Seal Case.\f
